globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://accounts.google.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://lh3.googleusercontent.com https://avatars.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.azurewebsites.net wss://*.azurewebsites.net https://accounts.google.com https://api.github.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), fullscreen=(self)
